notes: Self-contained algebraic engine for divisor-Galois-descent: transports adic valuations through a Dedekind-domain ring isomorphism, plus geometric bookkeeping lemmas for `pointValuation`/`ord_P`/`ordAtInfty` through `RingEquiv.cast`. All 16 declarations are axiom-clean (no sorry); the `count_map_ringEquiv` theorem needs elevated heartbeats (1000000, no comment) due to the `Associates` multiplicity characterization. The six cast/geometric lemmas at the bottom are unused within this file but serve as the interface consumed by `FrobeniusFunctionFieldEquiv.lean`.
